// Regenerate via `sbt compile` after modifying the binding trait.

package kyo.example

import scala.scalajs.js
import scala.scalajs.js.annotation.*
import scala.scalajs.js.typedarray.*
import scala.scalajs.reflect.annotation.EnableReflectiveInstantiation
import kyo.ffi.*
import kyo.ffi.internal.{AbiCheck, JsRawSegment, KoffiFacade, KoffiFn, NativeLoader, StructAbiCheck}

@EnableReflectiveInstantiation final class BufferBindingsImpl extends BufferBindings:
    import BufferBindingsImpl.*

    def process(buf: Buffer[Byte], len: Int)(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): kyo.Fiber.Unsafe[Int, Any] =
        val bufU8 = kyo.ffi.internal.FfiUnsafe.expect[JsRawSegment](buf.raw.asInstanceOf[AnyRef], classOf[JsRawSegment], "JsRawSegment on JS", "kyo.example.BufferBindings", "process").u8a
        kyo.ffi.internal.BlockingBridge.runAsync(facade, "process", js.Array[js.Any](bufU8, len), (raw: js.Any) =>
            val retVal = raw.asInstanceOf[Int]
            retVal
        )
end BufferBindingsImpl

object BufferBindingsImpl:
    AbiCheck.verify(1, "kyo.example.BufferBindings")
    private val facade = KoffiFacade.load(
        NativeLoader.jsResolve("kyo_buf"),
        Seq(
            KoffiFn("process", "process", "int", Seq[js.Any]("void*".asInstanceOf[js.Any], "int".asInstanceOf[js.Any]))
        )
    )
end BufferBindingsImpl
